name: Fuel Production Chemical Tax Exclusion

eligibility.description: Taxpayer must use the chemicals in a 'qualified fuel use' or sell them for such use/resale.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Exempts specific chemicals (acetylene, benzene, butylene, butadiene, ethylene, naphthalene, propylene, toluene, and xylene) from tax if used as fuel or to produce motor, diesel, aviation, or jet fuel.
